name: Cream of Broccoli Soup with Cheese
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pkg. Fresh or Frozen Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. In a three-quart saucepan, bring 5 cups water to a boil.
2. Add broccoli and onion; boil for 10 to 12 minutes.
3. Stir in seasonings and cheese until the cheese melts.
4. Add half-and-half and butter; stir and heat to boiling.
5. Slowly combine 1/2 cup cold water with flour, stirring until smooth.
6. Gradually add this mixture to the hot sauce, stirring rapidly.
7. Cook until the soup reaches the consistency of heavy cream.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
